name: chain_ph_launch_room_service_the_mac_cleane
method: [PH LAUNCH] Room Service: The Mac cleaner built for developers

stages.task: Scrape PH /developer-tools daily, extract new Mac utility launches with upvote count, tagline, pricing
Filter: upvotes > 50, category matches Mac/developer-tools/productivity, not already in index
Generate 3 content pieces per launch: comparison tweet, Reddit comment thread bait, SEO micro-article (developer-tools-for-mac niche)
